name: 3 Bathroom Plastic Tray Beauty Organizer Set Clear - Brightroom™
description:
Keep drawers, cabinets and countertops in your home neat and tidy with the help of this 3 Bathroom Plastic Tray Beauty Organizer Set from Brightroom™. Featuring three small organizer trays all made of clear plastic, this set offers convenient storage for small items like makeup brushes, sponges and cosmetics. Tall walls help keep items contained, and a modular, stackable design makes for more compact storage in a cupboard or cabinet.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
